questions.question: What does percentage mean?
questions.explanation: Percentage represents a fraction out of 100.

questions.question: How do you convert a fraction into a percentage?
How do you convert a decimal into a percentage?
questions.explanation: The result is written with the percent symbol.

questions.question: How do you convert a percentage into a fraction?
What is meant by percentage increase?
questions.correct_answer: The increase in value expressed as a percentage of the original value
questions.explanation: It measures how much a quantity grows relative to the original amount.

questions.question: What is meant by percentage decrease?
questions.correct_answer: The decrease in value expressed as a percentage of the original value
questions.explanation: It shows how much a quantity reduces compared to the original value.

questions.question: What is profit?
questions.correct_answer: Profit occurs when the selling price is greater than the cost price

questions.question: What is loss?
questions.correct_answer: Loss occurs when the selling price is less than the cost price

questions.question: What is discount?
questions.correct_answer: A reduction given on the marked price
questions.explanation: Discount reduces the selling price of an item.

questions.question: What is marked price?
questions.correct_answer: The price printed on an item before discount
questions.explanation: Discount is usually applied on the marked price.

notes.title: Percentage
notes.content: Percentage means per hundred and is used to compare quantities easily.

notes.title: Conversion Between Forms
notes.content: Fractions, decimals, and percentages represent the same values in different forms.

notes.title: Profit and Loss
notes.content: Profit occurs when SP > CP and loss occurs when SP < CP.

notes.title: Discount
notes.content: Selling price after discount = Marked Price − Discount.

facts.fact: Percentage always represents a value out of 100.
1% means one part out of one hundred.
Profit and loss percentages are always calculated on cost price.
Discount is calculated on the marked price of an item.
